name: clawcode-dashboard-client
_comment: Phase 116 — ClawCode dashboard v2 SPA. ALL dependencies live in the repo-root package.json (single node_modules). This manifest has scripts + identity ONLY — no deps block. shadcn `add` commands historically appended deps here; if that happens again, MOVE them to root package.json and clear this block. Duplicate React copies break hooks (Vite resolves react from nearest node_modules; if a sub-node_modules exists, you get TWO React instances and useEffect=null).
